TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wurosi Simpu == Wurosi Simpu (Toic: Josef Eugster Johann, 1940), masofoc i Switzerland, o Simpu no Tinsokiw, o nano Payrenwayfang tintokay Taywan sa'etal kakeridan ato Kakacawan sa'etal mikomoday Simpu. O niano FJM Wurosi Simpu no saripa' a patangka' to tireng (Fr. Josef's Method of Reflexology) a palowaday, o palowaday sapiwi'awi' to saripa' i Taywan. I 1970 miheca 8 folad 24 romi'ad ci Wurosi Simpu maocor patayra i Posong mipadama, i 1989 miheca maocor tayra i Kakacawan kiwkay mipadama tangasa anini. Ci Wurosi Simpu malenak ko nirakatan ningra itini limaay faniyot a kitakit ato sa'etal (Australia, United States, Canada, Bolivia, Zimbabwe, Tanzania, China). Kasofocan I 1968 miheca mapatireng cingra i niyaro' Berneck no Switzerland ko kalasimpu, ikor no tosa miheca tayni i Taywan misinting, sarakat itira i niyaro' no Fanaw no Posong matayal, ikor maocor no citodongay patayra i no Kakacawan sakowan. Katayni ningra i Taywan i, caay ka nga'ay ko tatirengan ningra a la'em'em malacaan, saka o kapot ningra pa'olid to mafana'ay miwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana', itiya misitapang midemak to piwi'awi' nanoyaan sa manga'ay ko tatoresan no 'okak. Nanoya ci Wurosi Simpu misatapang maolah tonini a miwi'awi' to saripa', mikingkiw to cingra to sifana' ato picowat toni a sapawacay to sapacomahad to pakayniay piwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana'. Nikawrira, masapakoyoc ho kasaniyaro' finawlan no Taywan itiya, awaay ko sapipaising, o nikaitira i niyaro' no yincumin ni Wurosi Simpu, pasifana' to saki miwi'awi'ay to saripa' a sifana', mangalay cingra to sakanga'ayaw tangka' no tatirengan no finawlan, nanay o itiniay i niyaro' a tamdaw minanam to sifana' no piwi'awi' t osaripa', mala sakadademak a tayal, mapacakat ko saka'orip no laloma'an. Ikor i, masapinang to no kasaniyaro'aro' no Taywan to piwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana' ni Wurosi Simpu, sa'aloman sato ko misintingay to nga'ayay ni Wurosi Simpu. Pasadaken ni Wurosi Simpu ko nitilidan ningra to pakayniay sapasifana' to piwi'awi' to saripa' a tanengnengan tilid. I kasaniyaro' no Taywan i, ala pakafikafit to i pa'acaay to "Miwi'awi'ay to saripa' ni Wu Simpo" sanay. Onini a tilid, masinting to nai Taywan a Tayra i Hongkong. Ikor, i 1980 miheca a to'ek, tadamaanay ikaan tamdaw ci Zhourunfa misintingay to cecay a miwi'awi'ay saripa', nanoyaan sato ci Wurosi Simpu ato ningra a picikeroh to miwi'awi'ay to saripa' itira i Hongkong macowat, madenga to tayra i Congko. Mipahofin ko Conghua renmin nikapolongan kitakit to romaay kitakit tamdaw to katadamaan saki Holam a tamdaw, mapaskaolahay cingra tonini a katadamaan itiya. Kalaliyangan no 'alomanay ko sapiwi'awi' to saripa' a fana' itiya ho. O nika pakinali mapisinting to piwi'awi' to saripa' a fana' itiya ho, mahinapec to nisafaloco' an ni Wurosi Simpu to sakaira no sapinga'ay no adada, saka mifo'ot ko isiso no Taywan pakayniay piwi'awi' to saripa', saka mala o kasasowalen no tamdamdaw ci Wurosi Simpu, oya sato nano Paylenwayfan sintingkay ira ko pisa'et to demak no sinkiw a tayal. Ikor o Isiso i 1993 miheca mihokok to piwi'awi' to saripa' o nga'ayay sapinga'ay to adada sanay to, caay to ko aemeten, nanoya sato o piwi'awi' to saripa' manga'ay to ko kacingangan, manga'ayto malenak i kasaniyaro'. Saki ci Sen John Pall Simpo saka tosa tatapangan no Tinsokiw, midemak ci Wurosi Simpu to piwi'awi' to saripa' sakatangka'. Matira awaay ko picoker no kiwkay ci Wurosi Simpu. Tangasa i 2003 miheca, mapatiro' no dayhiw no tatapangan tarokos ci Dai Ruiming to nga'ayay demak ni Wurosi Simpu itiya i, oya caayay ka nga'ay ko karomakat, ato marihaw ko takolaw a pasowal, matakonol ko tatirengan ni Sen John Pall Simpo/hongti, midemak to piwi'awi' to saripa' to pinga'ayaw. Itiya misa'imer ko tatapangan tarokos maocor ko tatoloay a kakeridan misapinang to sapidemak. Misongila' ci Wurosi Simpu misaheci to pakayniay i piwi'awi' to saripa' to sakanga'ay piadah, papitanamen koya tatoloay to piwi'awi' to saripa', misapinang i tatirengan nangra masamaanay ko nika nga'ay; saikor haydaen nangra ko pidemak ni Wurosi Simpu piwi'awi' to saripa' miadah to adada ni Sen John Pall Simpoan. Midotoc to sowal ni Wurosi Simpu, ikor no piliyas ningra iraay ho ko padoedoay mipatado to Tatapangan hongti no Tinsokiw hakiya; nika, nano marihaway ko ngiha a caay ka caciyaw, ikor no cecay folad manga'ay ti ningra pasowal saan, itiya mihapiw to Kolosimas a sasowalen. Naitiya, oya miliyangay a salaloma'an no kiwkay i, lasawad sato to tatiihay a sowal, nanoya mihayda to ko kasakiwkay to nidemakan ni Wurosi Simpu. Pinengnengan to tilid.
S.PHON: == wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u == wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u (to~uiʦ: *o~usəf əo~u~u*stər *o~uħann, ****), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u simpo~u~u no~u tinso~ukiw, o~u nano~u pajrənwajfaŋ tinto~ukaj tajwan saʡətaɾ kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u kakaʦawan saʡətaɾ miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj simpo~u~u. o~u niano~u f*m wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u no~u saripaʡ a pataŋkaʡ to~u tirəŋ (fr. *o~usəfʡs mətħo~uɬ~ɮ o~uf rəfɾəxo~uɾo~u*j) a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj, o~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj sapiwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ i tajwan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u mao~uʦo~ur patajra i po~uso~uŋ mipaɬ~ɮama, i **** miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur tajra i kakaʦawan kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮama taŋasa anini. ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u maɾənak ko~u nirakatan niŋra itini ɾimaaj fanijo~ut a kitakit ato~u saʡətaɾ (ao~u~ustraɾia, o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ statəs, ʦanaɬ~ɮa, b~b~vo~uɾib~via, *imb~b~vab~b~vwə, tan*ania, ʦħina). kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ʦiŋra i nijaro~uʡ b~b~vərnəʦk no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾasimpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u to~usa miħəʦa tajni i tajwan misintiŋ, sarakat itira i nijaro~uʡ no~u fanaw no~u po~uso~uŋ matajaɾ, iko~ur mao~uʦo~ur no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj patajra i no~u kakaʦawan sako~uwan. katajni niŋra i tajwan i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u tatirəŋan niŋra a ɾaʡəmʡəm maɾaʦaan, saka o~u kapo~ut niŋra paʡo~uɾiɬ~ɮ to~u mafanaʡaj miwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ, itija misitapaŋ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piwiʡawiʡ nano~ujaan sa maŋaʡaj ko~u tato~urəsan no~u ʡo~ukak. nano~uja ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u misatapaŋ mao~uɾaħ to~unini a miwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, mikiŋkiw to~u ʦiŋra to~u sifanaʡ ato~u piʦo~uwat to~uni a sapawaʦaj to~u sapaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ. nikawrira, masapako~ujo~uʦ ħo~u kasanijaro~uʡ finawɾan no~u tajwan itija, awaaj ko~u sapipaisiŋ, o~u nikaitira i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, pasifanaʡ to~u saki miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ, maŋaɾaj ʦiŋra to~u sakaŋaʡajaw taŋkaʡ no~u tatirəŋan no~u finawɾan, nanaj o~u itiniaj i nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw minanam to~u sifanaʡ no~u piwiʡawiʡ t o~usaripaʡ, maɾa sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a tajaɾ, mapaʦakat ko~u sakaʡo~urip no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. iko~ur i, masapinaŋ to~u no~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ no~u tajwan to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u misintiŋaj to~u ŋaʡajaj ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. pasaɬ~ɮakən ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra to~u pakajniaj sapasifanaʡ to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a tanəŋnəŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u tajwan i, aɾa pakafikafit to~u i paʡaʦaaj to~u "miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ ni wo~u~u simpo~u" sanaj. o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, masintiŋ to~u nai tajwan a tajra i ħo~uŋko~uŋ. iko~ur, i **** miħəʦa a to~uʡək, taɬ~ɮamaanaj ikaan tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *ħo~uo~u~uro~u~unfa misintiŋaj to~u ʦəʦaj a miwiʡawiʡaj saripaʡ, nano~ujaan sato~u ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u ato~u niŋra a piʦikəro~uħ to~u miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ itira i ħo~uŋko~uŋ maʦo~uwat, maɬ~ɮəŋa to~u tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u. mipaħo~ufin ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit to~u ro~umaaj kitakit tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan saki ħo~uɾam a tamɬ~ɮaw, mapaskao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋra to~unini a kataɬ~ɮamaan itija. kaɾaɾijaŋan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u sapiwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a fanaʡ itija ħo~u. o~u nika pakinaɾi mapisintiŋ to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a fanaʡ itija ħo~u, maħinapəʦ to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ an ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u to~u sakaira no~u sapiŋaʡaj no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, saka mifo~uʡo~ut ko~u isiso~u no~u tajwan pakajniaj piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, saka maɾa o~u kasaso~uwaɾən no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, o~uja sato~u nano~u pajɾənwajfan sintiŋkaj ira ko~u pisaʡət to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sinkiw a tajaɾ. iko~ur o~u isiso~u i **** miħəʦa miħo~uko~uk to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ o~u ŋaʡajaj sapiŋaʡaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa sanaj to~u, ʦaaj to~u ko~u aəmətən, nano~uja sato~u o~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ maŋaʡaj to~u ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan, maŋaʡajto~u maɾənak i kasanijaro~uʡ. saki ʦi sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~u saka to~usa tatapaŋan no~u tinso~ukiw, miɬ~ɮəmak ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ sakataŋkaʡ. matira awaaj ko~u piʦo~ukər no~u kiwkaj ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, mapatiro~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tatapaŋan taro~uko~us ʦi ɬ~ɮai ro~u~uimiŋ to~u ŋaʡajaj ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u itija i, o~uja ʦaajaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u karo~umakat, ato~u mariħaw ko~u tako~uɾaw a paso~uwaɾ, matako~uno~uɾ ko~u tatirəŋan ni sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~u/ħo~uŋti, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ to~u piŋaʡajaw. itija misaʡimər ko~u tatapaŋan taro~uko~us mao~uʦo~ur ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan misapinaŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak. miso~uŋiɾaʡ ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u misaħəʦi to~u pakajniaj i piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ to~u sakaŋaʡaj piaɬ~ɮaħ, papitanamən ko~uja tato~uɾo~uaj to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, misapinaŋ i tatirəŋan naŋra masamaanaj ko~u nika ŋaʡaj; saiko~ur ħajɬ~ɮaən naŋra ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~uan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u so~uwaɾ ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u piɾijas niŋra iraaj ħo~u ko~u paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tatapaŋan ħo~uŋti no~u tinso~ukiw ħakija; nika, nano~u mariħawaj ko~u ŋiħa a ʦaaj ka ʦaʦijaw, iko~ur no~u ʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maŋaʡaj ti niŋra paso~uwaɾ saan, itija miħapiw to~u ko~uɾo~usimas a saso~uwaɾən. naitija, o~uja miɾijaŋaj a saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kiwkaj i, ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u to~u tatiiħaj a so~uwaɾ, nano~uja miħajɬ~ɮa to~u ko~u kasakiwkaj to~u niɬ~ɮəmakan ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: == Wurosi Simpu == Wurosi Simpu (Toic: Josef Eugster Johann, 1940), masofoc i Switzerland, o Simpu no Tinsokiw, o nano Payrenwayfang tintokay Taywan sa'etal kakeridan ato Kakacawan sa'etal mikomoday Simpu. O niano FJM Wurosi Simpu no saripa' a patangka' to tireng (Fr. Josef's Method of Reflexology) a palowaday, o palowaday sapiwi'awi' to saripa' i Taywan. I 1970 miheca 8 folad 24 romi'ad ci Wurosi Simpu maocor patayra i Posong mipadama, i 1989 miheca maocor tayra i Kakacawan kiwkay mipadama tangasa anini. Ci Wurosi Simpu malenak ko nirakatan ningra itini limaay faniyot a kitakit ato sa'etal (Australia, United States, Canada, Bolivia, Zimbabwe, Tanzania, China). Kasofocan I 1968 miheca mapatireng cingra i niyaro' Berneck no Switzerland ko kalasimpu, ikor no tosa miheca tayni i Taywan misinting, sarakat itira i niyaro' no Fanaw no Posong matayal, ikor maocor no citodongay patayra i no Kakacawan sakowan. Katayni ningra i Taywan i, caay ka nga'ay ko tatirengan ningra a la'em'em malacaan, saka o kapot ningra pa'olid to mafana'ay miwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana', itiya misitapang midemak to piwi'awi' nanoyaan sa manga'ay ko tatoresan no 'okak. Nanoya ci Wurosi Simpu misatapang maolah tonini a miwi'awi' to saripa', mikingkiw to cingra to sifana' ato picowat toni a sapawacay to sapacomahad to pakayniay piwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana'. Nikawrira, masapakoyoc ho kasaniyaro' finawlan no Taywan itiya, awaay ko sapipaising, o nikaitira i niyaro' no yincumin ni Wurosi Simpu, pasifana' to saki miwi'awi'ay to saripa' a sifana', mangalay cingra to sakanga'ayaw tangka' no tatirengan no finawlan, nanay o itiniay i niyaro' a tamdaw minanam to sifana' no piwi'awi' t osaripa', mala sakadademak a tayal, mapacakat ko saka'orip no laloma'an. Ikor i, masapinang to no kasaniyaro'aro' no Taywan to piwi'awi' to saripa' a sifana' ni Wurosi Simpu, sa'aloman sato ko misintingay to nga'ayay ni Wurosi Simpu. Pasadaken ni Wurosi Simpu ko nitilidan ningra to pakayniay sapasifana' to piwi'awi' to saripa' a tanengnengan tilid. I kasaniyaro' no Taywan i, ala pakafikafit to i pa'acaay to "Miwi'awi'ay to saripa' ni Wu Simpo" sanay. Onini a tilid, masinting to nai Taywan a Tayra i Hongkong. Ikor, i 1980 miheca a to'ek, tadamaanay ikaan tamdaw ci Zhourunfa misintingay to cecay a miwi'awi'ay saripa', nanoyaan sato ci Wurosi Simpu ato ningra a picikeroh to miwi'awi'ay to saripa' itira i Hongkong macowat, madenga to tayra i Congko. Mipahofin ko Conghua renmin nikapolongan kitakit to romaay kitakit tamdaw to katadamaan saki Holam a tamdaw, mapaskaolahay cingra tonini a katadamaan itiya. Kalaliyangan no 'alomanay ko sapiwi'awi' to saripa' a fana' itiya ho. O nika pakinali mapisinting to piwi'awi' to saripa' a fana' itiya ho, mahinapec to nisafaloco' an ni Wurosi Simpu to sakaira no sapinga'ay no adada, saka mifo'ot ko isiso no Taywan pakayniay piwi'awi' to saripa', saka mala o kasasowalen no tamdamdaw ci Wurosi Simpu, oya sato nano Paylenwayfan sintingkay ira ko pisa'et to demak no sinkiw a tayal. Ikor o Isiso i 1993 miheca mihokok to piwi'awi' to saripa' o nga'ayay sapinga'ay to adada sanay to, caay to ko aemeten, nanoya sato o piwi'awi' to saripa' manga'ay to ko kacingangan, manga'ayto malenak i kasaniyaro'. Saki ci Sen John Pall Simpo saka tosa tatapangan no Tinsokiw, midemak ci Wurosi Simpu to piwi'awi' to saripa' sakatangka'. Matira awaay ko picoker no kiwkay ci Wurosi Simpu. Tangasa i 2003 miheca, mapatiro' no dayhiw no tatapangan tarokos ci Dai Ruiming to nga'ayay demak ni Wurosi Simpu itiya i, oya caayay ka nga'ay ko karomakat, ato marihaw ko takolaw a pasowal, matakonol ko tatirengan ni Sen John Pall Simpo/hongti, midemak to piwi'awi' to saripa' to pinga'ayaw. Itiya misa'imer ko tatapangan tarokos maocor ko tatoloay a kakeridan misapinang to sapidemak. Misongila' ci Wurosi Simpu misaheci to pakayniay i piwi'awi' to saripa' to sakanga'ay piadah, papitanamen koya tatoloay to piwi'awi' to saripa', misapinang i tatirengan nangra masamaanay ko nika nga'ay; saikor haydaen nangra ko pidemak ni Wurosi Simpu piwi'awi' to saripa' miadah to adada ni Sen John Pall Simpoan. Midotoc to sowal ni Wurosi Simpu, ikor no piliyas ningra iraay ho ko padoedoay mipatado to Tatapangan hongti no Tinsokiw hakiya; nika, nano marihaway ko ngiha a caay ka caciyaw, ikor no cecay folad manga'ay ti ningra pasowal saan, itiya mihapiw to Kolosimas a sasowalen. Naitiya, oya miliyangay a salaloma'an no kiwkay i, lasawad sato to tatiihay a sowal, nanoya mihayda to ko kasakiwkay to nidemakan ni Wurosi Simpu. Pinengnengan to tilid.
S.PHON: == wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u == wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u (to~uiʦ: *o~usəf əo~u~u*stər *o~uħann, ****), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u simpo~u~u no~u tinso~ukiw, o~u nano~u pajrənwajfaŋ tinto~ukaj tajwan saʡətaɾ kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u kakaʦawan saʡətaɾ miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj simpo~u~u. o~u niano~u f*m wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u no~u saripaʡ a pataŋkaʡ to~u tirəŋ (fr. *o~usəfʡs mətħo~uɬ~ɮ o~uf rəfɾəxo~uɾo~u*j) a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj, o~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj sapiwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ i tajwan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u mao~uʦo~ur patajra i po~uso~uŋ mipaɬ~ɮama, i **** miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur tajra i kakaʦawan kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮama taŋasa anini. ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u maɾənak ko~u nirakatan niŋra itini ɾimaaj fanijo~ut a kitakit ato~u saʡətaɾ (ao~u~ustraɾia, o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ statəs, ʦanaɬ~ɮa, b~b~vo~uɾib~via, *imb~b~vab~b~vwə, tan*ania, ʦħina). kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ʦiŋra i nijaro~uʡ b~b~vərnəʦk no~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾasimpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u to~usa miħəʦa tajni i tajwan misintiŋ, sarakat itira i nijaro~uʡ no~u fanaw no~u po~uso~uŋ matajaɾ, iko~ur mao~uʦo~ur no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj patajra i no~u kakaʦawan sako~uwan. katajni niŋra i tajwan i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u tatirəŋan niŋra a ɾaʡəmʡəm maɾaʦaan, saka o~u kapo~ut niŋra paʡo~uɾiɬ~ɮ to~u mafanaʡaj miwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ, itija misitapaŋ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piwiʡawiʡ nano~ujaan sa maŋaʡaj ko~u tato~urəsan no~u ʡo~ukak. nano~uja ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u misatapaŋ mao~uɾaħ to~unini a miwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, mikiŋkiw to~u ʦiŋra to~u sifanaʡ ato~u piʦo~uwat to~uni a sapawaʦaj to~u sapaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ. nikawrira, masapako~ujo~uʦ ħo~u kasanijaro~uʡ finawɾan no~u tajwan itija, awaaj ko~u sapipaisiŋ, o~u nikaitira i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, pasifanaʡ to~u saki miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ, maŋaɾaj ʦiŋra to~u sakaŋaʡajaw taŋkaʡ no~u tatirəŋan no~u finawɾan, nanaj o~u itiniaj i nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw minanam to~u sifanaʡ no~u piwiʡawiʡ t o~usaripaʡ, maɾa sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a tajaɾ, mapaʦakat ko~u sakaʡo~urip no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. iko~ur i, masapinaŋ to~u no~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ no~u tajwan to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a sifanaʡ ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u misintiŋaj to~u ŋaʡajaj ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. pasaɬ~ɮakən ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra to~u pakajniaj sapasifanaʡ to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a tanəŋnəŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u tajwan i, aɾa pakafikafit to~u i paʡaʦaaj to~u "miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ ni wo~u~u simpo~u" sanaj. o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, masintiŋ to~u nai tajwan a tajra i ħo~uŋko~uŋ. iko~ur, i **** miħəʦa a to~uʡək, taɬ~ɮamaanaj ikaan tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *ħo~uo~u~uro~u~unfa misintiŋaj to~u ʦəʦaj a miwiʡawiʡaj saripaʡ, nano~ujaan sato~u ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u ato~u niŋra a piʦikəro~uħ to~u miwiʡawiʡaj to~u saripaʡ itira i ħo~uŋko~uŋ maʦo~uwat, maɬ~ɮəŋa to~u tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u. mipaħo~ufin ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit to~u ro~umaaj kitakit tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan saki ħo~uɾam a tamɬ~ɮaw, mapaskao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋra to~unini a kataɬ~ɮamaan itija. kaɾaɾijaŋan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u sapiwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a fanaʡ itija ħo~u. o~u nika pakinaɾi mapisintiŋ to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ a fanaʡ itija ħo~u, maħinapəʦ to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ an ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u to~u sakaira no~u sapiŋaʡaj no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, saka mifo~uʡo~ut ko~u isiso~u no~u tajwan pakajniaj piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, saka maɾa o~u kasaso~uwaɾən no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, o~uja sato~u nano~u pajɾənwajfan sintiŋkaj ira ko~u pisaʡət to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sinkiw a tajaɾ. iko~ur o~u isiso~u i **** miħəʦa miħo~uko~uk to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ o~u ŋaʡajaj sapiŋaʡaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa sanaj to~u, ʦaaj to~u ko~u aəmətən, nano~uja sato~u o~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ maŋaʡaj to~u ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan, maŋaʡajto~u maɾənak i kasanijaro~uʡ. saki ʦi sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~u saka to~usa tatapaŋan no~u tinso~ukiw, miɬ~ɮəmak ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ sakataŋkaʡ. matira awaaj ko~u piʦo~ukər no~u kiwkaj ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, mapatiro~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tatapaŋan taro~uko~us ʦi ɬ~ɮai ro~u~uimiŋ to~u ŋaʡajaj ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u itija i, o~uja ʦaajaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u karo~umakat, ato~u mariħaw ko~u tako~uɾaw a paso~uwaɾ, matako~uno~uɾ ko~u tatirəŋan ni sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~u/ħo~uŋti, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ to~u piŋaʡajaw. itija misaʡimər ko~u tatapaŋan taro~uko~us mao~uʦo~ur ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan misapinaŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak. miso~uŋiɾaʡ ʦi wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u misaħəʦi to~u pakajniaj i piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ to~u sakaŋaʡaj piaɬ~ɮaħ, papitanamən ko~uja tato~uɾo~uaj to~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ, misapinaŋ i tatirəŋan naŋra masamaanaj ko~u nika ŋaʡaj; saiko~ur ħajɬ~ɮaən naŋra ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u piwiʡawiʡ to~u saripaʡ miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni sən *o~uħn paɾɾ simpo~uan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u so~uwaɾ ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u piɾijas niŋra iraaj ħo~u ko~u paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tatapaŋan ħo~uŋti no~u tinso~ukiw ħakija; nika, nano~u mariħawaj ko~u ŋiħa a ʦaaj ka ʦaʦijaw, iko~ur no~u ʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maŋaʡaj ti niŋra paso~uwaɾ saan, itija miħapiw to~u ko~uɾo~usimas a saso~uwaɾən. naitija, o~uja miɾijaŋaj a saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kiwkaj i, ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u to~u tatiiħaj a so~uwaɾ, nano~uja miħajɬ~ɮa to~u ko~u kasakiwkaj to~u niɬ~ɮəmakan ni wo~u~uro~usi simpo~u~u. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ.
